channel.title: LLM Energy Benchmark — Updates
channel.description: New measurements and analyses on the energy cost of quantized LLM inference (INT8, NF4, FP16) across NVIDIA GPUs.

item.title: RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell FP16 End-to-End Baseline
item.description: RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell FP16 end-to-end baseline for Qwen2.5-3B at 256 and 512 generated tokens, reported in J/1k tokens with throughput and power.

item.title: RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell: Phase-Separated Energy Profiling
item.description: Supplemental RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell phase-separated energy profiling data, highlighting prefill/decode behavior and backend-architecture interaction under bitsandbytes 0.49.2.

item.title: Qwen2.5-3B on Tesla T4
item.description: Supplemental update: Qwen2.5-3B on Tesla T4 measurements (FP16 vs NF4), including Figure 5 summary and Table 8 results.
